ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DIAZ, L. FERNANDO
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCHOR REALTY, INC. COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-03-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 606 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. JOHN CONWAY, JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. JANET POND, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: MARK CAMPANA, PRESIDENT OF ANCHOR REALTY, INC. AND HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, FREDERICK EMILSON, ESQ. ALSO PRESENT WAS DEFENDANT IN PRO PER LOUIS FERNANDO DIAZ AND LEO BATALLE ASSISTING DEFENDANT. 10:00 A.M. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. TERMS REPORTED ON THE RECORD. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCHOR REALTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, L. FERNANDO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS;COMPLAINT;PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCHOR REALTY, INC. SERVED JUN-17-1998, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCHOR REALTY, INC.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, L. FERNANDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 DIVISADERO STREET APARTMENT #1 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 9/30/98 PROVIDED DEFENDANT PAYS $1,500.00 BY 8/3/98 AT 5:00 P.M. TO LAW OFFICE OF WEIGEL AND FRIED. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COST. TENANCY AND RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED ON 9/30/98 IF DEFENDANT PAYS $1,500.00 BY 8/3/98.
